summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Route Sentinel production-grade synthetic monitoring system. All backend APIs (9/9) and frontend components working perfectly. Real Playwright browser automation, MongoDB persistence, scheduler, and alert engine all functional.
passed_tests: GET /api/overview - System health summary with targets, success rate, scheduler status
GET /api/targets - List of monitoring targets with status indicators
GET /api/targets/demo-httpbin - Target detail with recent runs and stats
GET /api/targets/demo-httpbin/runs - Paginated route runs
GET /api/alerts - Alert history retrieval
GET /api/alerts/active - Currently active alerts (0 active)
GET /api/config - Sanitized config display (no secrets exposed)
POST /api/config/reload - Config reload functionality
POST /api/monitor/run/demo-example - Playwright browser check (1.4s completion)
GET /api/scheduler - Scheduler status with 2 active jobs
Frontend Overview page with metric cards, charts, scheduler status, recent runs
Frontend Targets page with target cards showing health status
Frontend Target detail page with timeline, charts, routes tabs
Frontend Alerts page showing 'All Clear' status
Frontend Config page with syntax-highlighted JSON config, Copy and Reload buttons
Sidebar navigation between all pages working
Run All button in sidebar triggers monitoring checks
Run Now button on target detail page triggers single target check
Real-time data integration and dashboard refresh
Dark theme UI with professional design
MongoDB data persistence
APScheduler background job execution
Playwright headless browser automation
